title: A Scallywag Party Spectacular With Chainska Brassika
description: Welcome to the Scallywag Party, a home for all lovers of good times and upbeat live music. Headlining our fringe spectacular is the fantastic high energy, brass driven 9 piece, Chainska Brassika plus Bars Against Humanity, Belver, DJ Soleil, Lord Disorderly, Laura Loops and more acts tba. Eclectic, positive and dance inducing - our aim is to introduce you to the very best independent artists from the UK festival circuit. We’re so pleased to have been invited back to Caravanserai on this first Saturday of the festival and we are pulling out all the stops and create a truly spectacular scallywag party not to be missed. Alongside amazing live music and DJ’s expect face painting, walkabouts, laughter, tomfoolery and togetherness. Scallywag Party have over a decade of experience running festivals, stages and events, championing grass roots acts and building a light hearted, live music loving community. Come join the family and get involved, WE bring the music but YOU make the party!

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
